text:
EXPLANATION: The paper "MOPO: Model-based Offline Policy Optimization" is a real paper published in NeurIPS 2020. However, the cited author list is incorrect; the actual authors are Tianhe Yu, Garrett Thomas, Lantao Yu, Stefano Ermon, James Y. Zou, Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn, and Tengyu Ma.

LINK: https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper/2020/hash/3553539828d0e98e2840e66c6b843336-Abstract.html
FOUND_TITLE: MOPO: Model-based Offline Policy Optimization
FOUND_AUTHORS: Tianhe Yu, Garrett Thomas, Lantao Yu, Stefano Ermon, James Y. Zou, Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn, Tengyu Ma
FOUND_YEAR: 2020
VERDICT: LIKELY
